hero.title: Whistle Camera - Selfie & More
hero.subtitle: Smart Camera App
hero.description: An innovative camera application that brings new features and capabilities to mobile photography. With whistle detection, incognito mode, and advanced controls, capture your moments like never before.
hero.structuredDataDescription: Whistle Camera — hands-free photo and video app for iOS and Android. Whistle to snap selfies, pet shots, and group photos. Practice whistle calibration, widgets, Siri shortcuts. Android com.zuki.apps.whistlecamera; iOS App Store id1037716421 by Zuki Apps.

whistle.title: Whistle Detection
whistle.description: Automatically capture photos or start/stop video when a whistle is detected

calibration.title: Tuned to your whistle
calibration.description: Practice mode teaches the app your exact whistle. Adjust sensitivity (1–5) and the 0–100 frequency band for quiet rooms or noisy parks.

photoVideo.title: Photo & video
photoVideo.description: Whistle for a still, or switch to video and whistle-start / whistle-stop recording. Countdown 0, 3, 5, or 10 seconds works with both.

gallery.title: Gallery & sharing
gallery.description: Browse captures in the built-in gallery. Full-screen preview, multi-select share or delete, optional save to a Photos album.

shortcuts.title: Widgets & Siri
shortcuts.description: Launch photo or video capture from Home Screen widgets. Siri shortcuts and Apple Watch remote shutter when the companion is installed.

incognito.title: Incognito Mode
incognito.description: Record or capture photos with a black screen overlay for privacy

locked.description: Launch camera from Lock Screen, Control Center, and Action Button

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how we protect your data

q1.question: How does whistle detection work?
q1.answer: Whistle Camera uses advanced audio processing to detect whistle sounds in real-time. When a whistle is detected, the app can automatically capture a photo or start/stop video recording. You can adjust the sensitivity in the app settings to match your environment.

q2.question: What is incognito mode?
q2.answer: Incognito mode displays a black screen overlay while recording or capturing photos, providing privacy protection. This allows you to capture media discreetly without the screen showing what's being captured.

q3.question: How do I access the camera from the Lock Screen?
q3.answer: Whistle Camera supports quick access from the Lock Screen, Control Center, and Action Button (iOS 18+). Simply add the camera widget to your Control Center or use the Action Button if your device supports it. The app will launch directly into camera mode.

q4.question: Does Whistle Camera require an internet connection?
q4.answer: No, Whistle Camera works completely offline. All photos and videos are stored locally on your device. The app only requires internet access if you choose to share media or if you contact support.

q5.question: How do I adjust whistle detection sensitivity?
q5.answer: Go to Settings → Whistle Detection → Sensitivity. You can adjust the sensitivity slider to make detection more or less sensitive. Higher sensitivity will detect quieter whistles, while lower sensitivity requires louder whistles.

q6.question: Can I use Whistle Camera without microphone access?
q6.answer: Whistle detection requires microphone access. However, you can still use the app for regular photo and video capture without whistle detection. The microphone is only used for real-time whistle detection processing and no audio is recorded or stored.

q7.question: Can I use a timer instead of whistling?
q7.answer: Yes — countdown timer (3, 5, or 10 seconds) works with or without whistle detection enabled.

additionalHelp.title: Need More Help?
additionalHelp.description: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, or if you're experiencing a technical issue, please don't hesitate to contact us. We're here to help and typically respond within 24-48 hours.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Whistle Camera. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Whistle Camera ("Service", "App", "we", "us", or "our"), a camera application operated by Zuki Apps ("Company"). By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Whistle Camera is a mobile camera application that provides innovative features for mobile photography. The Service includes:
items: Whistle detection for automatic photo capture and video recording
Locked camera capture from Lock Screen and Control Center

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: Whistle Camera is designed with privacy in mind. We collect minimal information necessary to provide the service. We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you use our services or contact us for support.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Your photos and videos are stored locally on your device and are not transmitted to our servers unless you explicitly choose to share them.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information or media to third parties without your consent. Your photos and videos remain on your device and are only shared when you explicitly choose to share them.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All photos and videos are stored locally on your device in the app's private directory, which is not accessible by other apps.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your photos and videos at any time. You can delete all media through the app's gallery. You may also uninstall the app at any time, which will remove all locally stored data.

section6.title: 6. Camera and Microphone Access
section6.content: Whistle Camera requires access to your device's camera and microphone to provide its core functionality. The camera is used for photo and video capture. The microphone is used for whistle detection. We do not record or store audio data - the microphone is only used for real-time whistle detection processing.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Detection, privacy, storage, Pro, and troubleshooting.

items.question: What is Whistle Camera?
items.answer: Whistle Camera is a hands-free camera app for iOS and Android. Whistle to take a photo or (with Pro) start and stop video. Package on Android: com.zuki.apps.whistlecamera. iOS App Store ID: 1037716421.

items.question: It doesn’t detect my whistle well. What can I do?
items.answer: Lower sensitivity (try level 1), widen the frequency range in Settings, enable the live debug overlay, and use Practice whistle to calibrate from your session peaks.

items.question: Do I need internet?
items.answer: Core whistle capture works offline. Ads, analytics, and purchase checks may need a network connection.

items.question: Why does the app need the microphone?
items.answer: The app listens for your whistle to trigger the camera. Audio is processed on-device for detection — it is not stored as recordings.

items.question: Where are photos stored?
items.answer: In the in-app gallery by default. You can optionally copy captures to a Photos album named Whistle Camera in Settings.

items.question: What is Pro?
items.answer: Pro unlocks whistle start/stop video, extra premium modes, and removes ads. One-time purchase; restore from Settings after reinstall.

items.question: Can I use a timer instead of whistling?
items.answer: Yes — countdown timer (3, 5, or 10 seconds) works with or without whistle detection enabled.
